notes: Renames the app to Tater Tube.
Adds the new image-based Tater Tube boot splash with aspect-correct scaling for composite and HDMI builds.
Adds a ready-to-flash Raspberry Pi 5 HDMI auto-resolution image alongside the NTSC and PAL composite images.
Updates Emby/Jellyfin and Plex Video on Demand to use display-adaptive transcode quality, up to 4K on HDMI displays while keeping CRT builds capped appropriately.
Adds PC Link HDMI presets up to 3840x2160 with higher bitrate and H.265 options.
Keeps the updater on the same Tater Tube image splash during firmware updates.
